CuraLive Monthly Infrastructure Costs

Real-Time Investor Events Platform — Cost Analysis

Prepared: March 2026 | Based on current production configuration

$297
Low Volume (20 events/mo)
$742
Medium (50 events/mo)
$1,617
High (100 events/mo)
$4,242
Enterprise (250 events/mo)
Fixed Monthly Costs (Always On)
ServicePurposePlan / TierMonthly Cost
Replit Application hosting, deployment, SSL, compute Pro / Teams $25.00
MySQL Database Drizzle ORM, all session/archive/metrics tables Managed DB $15.00
Ably Realtime Live transcript streaming, OCC notifications Free tier $0.00
Resend Transactional emails, intelligence report delivery Free (100/day) $0.00
Twilio Webphone/PSTN, conference dial-out (base) Pay-as-you-go $1.00
Telnyx Failover carrier for Africa/EMEA Pay-as-you-go $0.00
Mux RTMP live streaming, HLS playback Pay-as-you-go $0.00
Fixed Monthly Total $41.00
Variable Costs Per Event (Usage-Based)
ServiceWhat It DoesCost Per EventCalculation
OpenAI GPT-4o Full AI report (20 modules), crisis prediction, valuation impact, disclosure cert, monthly report ~25 LLM calls/event @ ~4K tokens avg $2.50
OpenAI GPT-4o-mini Evolution engine, advisory bot, support chat, Bastion AI, quick analysis ~15 calls/event @ ~2K tokens avg $0.05
OpenAI Whisper Audio/video transcription for archive uploads ~30 min avg audio per event $0.18
Recall.ai Bot Meeting bot joins Zoom/Teams/Meet for live capture $0.10/min, ~60 min avg live session $6.00
Ably Messages Real-time transcript chunks during live sessions ~200 messages/session (free tier: 6M/mo) $0.00
Mux Streaming Live RTMP ingest + HLS delivery (if webcast used) $0.025/min encode + $1/1000 views $1.50
Twilio Voice PSTN dial-out minutes (if conference used) $0.014/min, ~15 min avg $0.21
Resend Email Post-event intelligence reports, reminders ~5 emails/event (free up to 100/day) $0.00
Variable Cost Per Event ~$10.44
Cost Breakdown by Event Type
Event TypeTypical Services UsedEst. Cost/Event
Live Shadow Mode (Zoom/Teams) Recall bot + full AI pipeline + crisis/valuation/disclosure + streaming $10.44
Archive Upload (audio/video) Whisper transcription + full AI pipeline + crisis/valuation/disclosure $2.73
Transcript Paste (text only) AI pipeline only (no transcription, no bot) $2.55
Advisory Bot Query Single GPT-4o call with context retrieval $0.03
Monthly Intelligence Report Aggregation + single GPT-4o analysis $0.15
Scaled Monthly Projections
ScenarioLive EventsArchivesTranscriptsAdvisory QueriesTotal/Month
Startup 105550 $297
Growth 251510200 $742
Scale 503020500 $1,617
Enterprise 12080502000 $4,242
OpenAI Token Cost Breakdown
ModelInput $/1M tokensOutput $/1M tokensAvg Tokens/CallCalls/EventCost/Event
GPT-4o $2.50$10.00 ~4,000 in / ~1,500 out 25 $2.50
GPT-4o-mini $0.15$0.60 ~2,000 in / ~800 out 15 $0.05
Whisper $0.006/minute of audio 1 $0.18

Assumptions & Notes

  • Prices based on OpenAI API pricing as of March 2026 (GPT-4o: $2.50/$10.00 per 1M tokens in/out)
  • Recall.ai pricing estimated at $0.10/minute for bot-in-meeting time (actual may vary by contract)
  • Average live event duration: 60 minutes; average archive audio: 30 minutes
  • Each full AI report runs 20 core modules + 3 strategic modules (crisis, valuation, disclosure) = ~25 GPT-4o calls
  • Evolution engine, advisory bot, and background services use GPT-4o-mini for cost efficiency
  • Ably free tier covers up to 6M messages/month (sufficient for ~30,000 live sessions)
  • Resend free tier covers 100 emails/day (3,000/month) — sufficient up to ~600 events/month
  • Mux costs only apply when live RTMP webcast streaming is used (not all events)
  • Twilio/Telnyx costs only apply when PSTN dial-out is used (Shadow Mode uses free bot join)
  • Database costs based on Replit managed MySQL; may increase with storage beyond 1GB
  • No costs for the Shadow Guardian, System Diagnostics, or Health Monitoring — these are internal services
  • Stripe processing fees (2.9% + $0.30) not included — those are pass-through charges on revenue
Cost Optimization Opportunities
  • Biggest cost driver: Recall.ai bot minutes (~58% of per-event cost). Negotiate volume pricing or switch to local audio capture for shorter events
  • AI model selection: Move lower-priority modules (social media, press release) to GPT-4o-mini to cut AI costs by ~40%
  • Caching: Cache AI reports for repeated queries instead of regenerating; cache advisory bot context windows
  • Batch processing: Monthly reports aggregate existing data — no additional AI cost if reports are already generated
  • Whisper optimization: Only transcribe new audio; skip re-transcription of already-processed segments
CuraLive Platform | CIPC Patent App ID: 1773575338868 | Prepared for acquisition readiness review
